scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @orosaga/contracts && npm run build -w @orosaga/config && npm run build -w @orosaga/testing
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @orosaga/api && npm run build -w @orosaga/web && npm run build -w @orosaga/worker
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck:packages && npm run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck -w @orosaga/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @orosaga/config && npm run typecheck -w @orosaga/testing
scripts.typecheck:apps: npm run typecheck -w @orosaga/api && npm run typecheck -w @orosaga/web && npm run typecheck -w @orosaga/worker
scripts.check:bundle: node scripts/check-bundle-budget.mjs apps/web/dist/assets && node scripts/scan-web-bundle.mjs apps/web/dist
